title: Marketplace Manager - Porter - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Porter - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Porter invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Porter:
Porter is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter!
